content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Found 1 bug: a new test fixture snapshot still contains `final_review_planner`, which conflicts with the planner-removal contract.

## Amendments

1. File `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` now writes a prohibited field in the final-review snapshot: `stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner` is present at lines 33-36. This violates the required removal of planner-role artifacts from new final-review snapshots and will cause fixture-based snapshot checks for “planner-free” run output to fail or silently drift. (Severity: high)

Files: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:33-36`
   Rationale: Remove `final_review_planner` from generated/new fixture run snapshots so final-review snapshots only persist final_review_reviewers and final_review_arbiter (plus any other non-planner fields).
